metadata.description: Mock automation candidate dataset for finance, accounting, legal, and corporate operations use cases.

dimensions.name: business_impact
dimensions.description: Expected operational, financial, reporting, or executive visibility value.

dimensions.name: manual_effort_reduction
dimensions.description: Degree to which automation could reduce repeated manual work or spreadsheet dependency.

dimensions.name: data_readiness
dimensions.description: Availability, structure, quality, and reliability of the data required.

dimensions.name: integration_complexity
dimensions.description: Difficulty of connecting required systems through APIs, ETL, workflow tools, or file-based processes. Lower is easier.

dimensions.name: risk_level
dimensions.description: Potential legal, financial, operational, compliance, or reputational harm if output is wrong. Lower is safer.

dimensions.name: human_approval_need
dimensions.description: Degree to which human review is required before action or distribution.

dimensions.name: executive_visibility
dimensions.description: Likelihood that leadership would care about improvement in this workflow.

recommendation_bands.AUTOMATE_NOW: High value, low-to-moderate risk, clear owner, sufficient data readiness.
recommendation_bands.PROTOTYPE_FIRST: Strong candidate but should be validated through a controlled pilot.
recommendation_bands.HUMAN_IN_THE_LOOP: AI can assist, but human judgment and approval remain required.
recommendation_bands.DECISION_SUPPORT_ONLY: AI should summarize, classify, or recommend, but should not execute.
recommendation_bands.NEEDS_DATA_CLEANUP: Workflow has potential, but data quality or process clarity blocks automation.
recommendation_bands.DO_NOT_AUTOMATE_YET: Risk, ambiguity, or poor workflow fit makes automation premature.

candidates.name: Monthly Finance Reporting Summary
candidates.current_state: Finance team consolidates reports from multiple exports and manually drafts monthly commentary for leadership.
candidates.manual_pain: Recurring spreadsheet assembly, variance explanation drafting, and leadership-ready commentary consume review cycles.
candidates.automation_concept: Finance Reporting Agent that drafts variance summaries from approved sources and routes commentary for finance approval.
candidates.human_approval_gate: Finance leadership approves all final commentary before distribution.
candidates.failure_definition: Agent uses unapproved data, invents a variance explanation, or distributes commentary without finance approval.
candidates.first_30_day_action: Prototype with one recurring report package and compare AI-drafted commentary against current manual output.

candidates.name: Accounting Close-Cycle Task Tracker
candidates.current_state: Close status is tracked across spreadsheets, email follow-ups, and individual task owner updates.
candidates.manual_pain: Accounting leadership spends time chasing status, identifying blockers, and summarizing close readiness.
candidates.automation_concept: Accounting Close Assistant that tracks close tasks, flags missing reconciliations, and summarizes blocker status.
candidates.human_approval_gate: Accounting leadership retains final close certification authority.
candidates.failure_definition: Assistant marks a task complete without evidence or escalates an inaccurate blocker.
candidates.first_30_day_action: Map the close checklist, owner list, deadlines, and exception categories into a prototype task tracker.

candidates.name: Legal Contract Intake Summarizer
candidates.current_state: Contract requests arrive with inconsistent context, missing documents, and unclear routing priority.
candidates.manual_pain: Legal team loses time clarifying request type, missing materials, and review urgency before substantive review begins.
candidates.automation_concept: Legal Intake Agent that summarizes requests, extracts key terms, flags missing documents, and routes to legal review.
candidates.human_approval_gate: Legal team approves all legal interpretations, redlines, and final positions.
candidates.failure_definition: Agent gives legal advice, misses a high-risk clause, or treats missing documents as complete.
candidates.first_30_day_action: Build a safe intake-only prototype that classifies request type and missing materials without providing legal judgment.

candidates.name: Vendor Onboarding Checklist
candidates.current_state: Vendor onboarding steps are tracked manually with inconsistent follow-up and limited status visibility.
candidates.manual_pain: Missing documents, approvals, and handoffs delay vendor setup and create repeated follow-up work.
candidates.automation_concept: Vendor Onboarding Workflow that tracks required documents, routes approvals, and flags incomplete onboarding packages.
candidates.human_approval_gate: Operations owner approves onboarding completion before vendor activation.
candidates.failure_definition: Workflow marks onboarding complete with missing documents or routes approval to the wrong owner.
candidates.first_30_day_action: Convert current onboarding checklist into a structured workflow with owner, due date, and missing-document flags.

candidates.name: Manual Spreadsheet Consolidation
candidates.current_state: Recurring reports are built from multiple spreadsheets with manual copy/paste, cleanup, and formula adjustments.
candidates.manual_pain: Manual consolidation creates time loss, formula risk, version confusion, and limited repeatability.
candidates.automation_concept: Spreadsheet Replacement Pipeline that maps source systems, extracts repeatable logic, and creates a governed reporting flow.
candidates.human_approval_gate: Business owner validates all calculations and output definitions before automation.
candidates.failure_definition: Pipeline automates undocumented spreadsheet logic or reproduces a manual error at scale.
candidates.first_30_day_action: Inventory source files, formulas, manual adjustments, and output audience before building automation.

candidates.name: Executive Status Digest
candidates.workflow_owner_role: Chief of Staff or Operations Leader
candidates.current_state: Leadership updates are assembled manually from email threads, project notes, and department status reports.
candidates.manual_pain: Leadership lacks a consistent, concise view of blockers, decisions needed, and cross-functional status.
candidates.automation_concept: Executive Status Agent that summarizes blockers, decisions needed, late items, and cross-functional dependencies.
candidates.human_approval_gate: Operations leader approves digest before executive distribution.
candidates.failure_definition: Agent omits a material blocker, misstates a decision owner, or summarizes stale status as current.
candidates.first_30_day_action: Prototype with one weekly status package and validate summary accuracy with the operations owner.

candidates.name: AP Invoice Exception Routing
candidates.current_state: Invoice exceptions are reviewed manually and routed by email when vendor, PO, amount, or approval data does not match.
candidates.manual_pain: Exception review slows payment cycles and creates repeated follow-up between AP, procurement, and business owners.
candidates.automation_concept: AP Exception Routing Agent that classifies exception type, identifies missing data, and routes to the correct owner.
candidates.human_approval_gate: AP manager approves exception resolution and payment action.
candidates.failure_definition: Agent routes exception incorrectly, approves payment, or fails to flag a material mismatch.
candidates.first_30_day_action: Classify top exception types and build routing logic for non-payment recommendations only.

candidates.name: Policy and Procedure Search Assistant
candidates.current_state: Employees search across shared drives and policy documents for process answers, often relying on outdated files or informal knowledge.
candidates.manual_pain: Teams lose time locating current procedures and may act on outdated guidance.
candidates.automation_concept: Policy Search Assistant that retrieves approved policy language, summarizes relevant sections, and links to source documents.
candidates.human_approval_gate: Policy owner approves source library and response boundaries.
candidates.failure_definition: Assistant cites outdated policy or presents a summary as formal approval.
candidates.first_30_day_action: Create a controlled source library of approved documents and test retrieval accuracy against common questions.
